level_select.title: Choose a Room
level_select.subtitle: Clear rooms, collect treats, and earn stars.
tutorial.swipe_to_move: Swipe or tap a neighboring tile to move the cat to the exit.
tutorial.avoid_walls: Walls block the path. Read the hallway before you move.
tutorial.collect_fish: Collect every treat before leaving to earn all stars.
tutorial.collect_key: Pick up the golden key before stepping into the locked exit.
tutorial.push_box: Push boxes one tile at a time. Corners can trap them.
tutorial.step_on_button: Push a box onto the button to keep the door open.
tutorial.temporary_button: A temporary button only opens the door while something holds it.
tutorial.combine_box_and_key: Combine keys, boxes, and switches to make a safe route.
tutorial.target_steps: Plan a short route. Finish under target moves for a bonus star.
tutorial.chapter_review: Final room: collect treats, place the box, unlock the exit.
tutorial.chapter_one_extended: Use the mansion tricks together. Collect treats before taking the exit.
tutorial.chapter_one_finale: Final foyer test: combine treats, key, box, button, and bridge.
tutorial.chapter_two_library: Library rooms reuse familiar switches, but shelf paths ask for longer planning.
tutorial.chapter_two_review: Library review: combine box, button, bridge, key, and treats before leaving.
settings.title: Settings
